entry.title: Cursor SDK Lets Notion Ship a Full Coding Agent in Weeks
entry.summary: Cursor's SDK lets any product embed full coding agents in weeks, with Notion as the first major proof of concept

entry.title: Z.ai's Open-Weight GLM-5.2 Beats GPT-5.5 on Coding at 1/7 the Cost
entry.summary: Z.ai's open-weight GLM-5.2 scores 22.8% on ARC-AGI-2 at $0.25/task, matching GPT-5.4 and 5.5 at low reasoning effort â a first for an MIT-licensed model

entry.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Instant Gets Smarter at Reading Between the Lines
entry.summary: OpenAI ships a new GPT-5.5 Instant with sharper intent understanding, fewer hallucinations, and smarter personalization for ChatGPT's most-used model

entry.title: Exa Connect Unlocks Private Commercial Data for AI Agents
entry.summary: Exa Connect lets AI agents tap ZoomInfo, Crunchbase, Similarweb, and a dozen more premium data providers through a single API call, moving beyond the public web.

entry.title: Zed v1.8 Ships a Bootstrap Hook That Automates AI Agent Environments
entry.summary: Zed v1.8 lands with a new agent terminal init hook, smarter Git internals, and two handy editor selection commands

entry.title: NVIDIA's NeMo AutoModel Trains 550B MoE Models 3.7x Faster With One Import
entry.summary: NeMo AutoModel layers Expert Parallelism and DeepEP on top of Transformers v5, delivering 3.4â3.7x faster MoE fine-tuning with a single import change

entry.title: Sakana AI's Fugu Ultra Beats Frontier Models by Coordinating Them
entry.summary: Sakana AI's Fugu Ultra is now on OpenRouter â a 7B orchestrator that routes across frontier models to match Claude Fable 5 and Mythos on benchmarks, without training a single frontier model.

entry.title: xAI Turns Grok Build Into a Full-Stack Platform With Plugin Marketplace
entry.summary: xAI launches the Grok Build Plugin Marketplace in beta, shipping six partner integrations including MongoDB, Vercel, Sentry, and Cloudflare from your terminal

entry.title: OpenAI's JalapeÃ±o Chip Hits Silicon 9 Months After Design Kickoff
entry.summary: OpenAI's first custom silicon, JalapeÃ±o, goes from blank slate to running GPT-5.3 workloads in nine months â and it's just the start of a multi-generation compute platform targeting gigawatt-scale deployment.

entry.title: Qwen's AgentWorld Beats GPT-5 by Teaching AI to Simulate Environments
entry.summary: Qwen releases a language model trained to simulate agent environments, not just act in them â beating GPT-5.4 and Claude Opus 4.8 on a new 7-domain benchmark

entry.title: Moonshot AI Brings Kimi K2.7 Code to AWS, Targeting Enterprise Budgets
entry.summary: Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.7 Code lands on AWS Marketplace with EDP billing support, giving enterprise AWS teams a frontier-grade open-weight coding model without a new vendor contract

entry.title: Nous Research's Hermes Agent Gets a Live Pixel-Art Pet Showing What AI Does
entry.summary: Hermes Agent now supports animated pixel-art pets from the Petdex gallery that react live to agent state in both the GUI and terminal UI
